    • JAAS_CLIENT_ALLOWED_IDS

      public static final String JAAS_CLIENT_ALLOWED_IDS
      This is a regexp which limits the range of possible ids which can connect to the Bookie using SASL. By default only clients whose id contains the word 'bookkeeper' are allowed to connect.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
